text.title: SonarQube AI-Code Gate Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of gov-sonarqube-ai-code-gate. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Same quality gate for human + AI authors; AI-introduced patterns sneak in under the 80% bar.
antipattern.fix: Two gates: default + ai-strict-v1; PR tag routes.

antipattern.symptom: Engineer overrides gate via setting toggle; no record; bar erodes silently.
antipattern.fix: Require `gate-override` label + linked review; monthly audit.

antipattern.symptom: New hotspots merge under banner of 'pre-existing'.
antipattern.root-cause: Sonar treats new code wrong (PR diff misclassified).
antipattern.fix: Configure `sonar.newCode.referenceBranch` correctly; verify on smoke PR.
